281.description: Eastern Kentucky Concentrated Employment Program (EKCEP) Recovery & Reentry division serves 23 Appalachian coalfield counties through the Strategic Initiative for Transformational Employment (SITE). Job Entry and Retention Support Specialists (JERSS) connect justice-involved individuals and people in recovery with career advising, barrier relief (IDs, transportation, certifications), peer support training funding, and second-chance employer placement. EKCEP is a WIOA-funded American Job Center partner headquartered in Hazard.
281.description_es: EKCEP Recovery & Reentry sirve 23 condados apalaches a través del SITE. Especialistas JERSS conectan a personas en recuperación e involucradas con la justicia con orientación profesional, alivio de barreras (identificaciones, transporte, certificaciones), financiamiento de capacitación en apoyo entre pares y colocación con empleadores de segunda oportunidad. Socio de American Job Center con sede en Hazard.
281.notes: Connect with a JERSS at ekcep.org/recovery. Also operates Kentucky Career Center in Pikeville (id 502). Counties include Perry, Pike, Floyd, Letcher, Knott, and 18 others.
281.notes_es: Conecte con un JERSS en ekcep.org/recovery. Condados incluyen Perry, Pike, Floyd, Letcher, Knott y 18 más.
281.hours: Monday–Friday during business hours; contact for appointment
281.services: Recovery-informed career advising|Barrier relief assistance|Peer support certification funding|Second-chance job placement|American Job Center services

282.description: Baptist Fellowship Center is a faith-based community ministry in west Louisville offering youth mentoring (S.O.Y. Save Our Youth program), family support, employment readiness, and life-skills training for individuals and families seeking stability after incarceration or justice involvement. Provides mentoring, budgeting help, and connections to community partners—not a state-contracted reentry facility, but a grassroots support hub open to returning citizens.
282.description_es: Baptist Fellowship Center es un ministerio comunitario de base religiosa en el oeste de Louisville que ofrece mentoría juvenil (programa S.O.Y.), apoyo familiar, preparación laboral y capacitación en habilidades de vida para personas que buscan estabilidad después del encarcelamiento. Proporciona mentoría, ayuda con presupuesto y conexiones comunitarias.
282.notes: S.O.Y. male mentoring for ages 10–17. Family support includes counseling, parenting skills, and financial management. Call or use online contact form to inquire about adult reentry support.
282.notes_es: Mentoría S.O.Y. para jóvenes de 10–17 años. Apoyo familiar incluye consejería y habilidades financieras. Llame para consultar apoyo de reinserción para adultos.
282.hours: Monday–Friday during business hours; call for appointment
282.services: Youth mentoring (S.O.Y.)|Family support and counseling|Employment readiness training|Community resource connections|Life skills development

283.description: Narcotics Anonymous Kentucky offers free peer-led recovery meetings for people seeking freedom from addiction. Meetings available in all Kentucky regions—in-person, online, and hybrid—with no dues, fees, or membership requirements. Use the meeting finder to locate the nearest group by city or zip code. Welcoming to people leaving incarceration, treatment, or active use.
283.description_es: Narcotics Anonymous Kentucky ofrece reuniones gratuitas de recuperación lideradas por pares para personas que buscan libertad de la adicción. Reuniones en todas las regiones de Kentucky—en persona, en línea e híbridas—sin cuotas ni requisitos de membresía. Use el buscador de reuniones por ciudad o código postal.
283.notes: NA is not affiliated with any other organization. Meeting formats vary (open/closed, speaker, step study). Virtual meetings listed at naky.org. No referral required—just show up.
283.notes_es: NA no está afiliado a ninguna otra organización. Formatos de reuniones varían. Reuniones virtuales en naky.org. No se requiere referido.
283.hours: Meeting times vary by group; many groups meet daily—check meeting finder
283.services: In-person NA meetings|Online and hybrid meetings|Meeting locator by county|Peer-led recovery support|No-cost participation

284.description: Alcoholics Anonymous Kentucky provides free peer support meetings for people recovering from alcohol use disorder. Meetings held statewide in cities and rural communities, with many online options. No dues, fees, or professional counselors—members share experience, strength, and hope. Open to anyone with a desire to stop drinking, including people reentering from incarceration.
284.description_es: Alcoholics Anonymous Kentucky proporciona reuniones gratuitas de apoyo entre pares para personas en recuperación del trastorno por uso de alcohol. Reuniones en todo el estado con muchas opciones en línea. Sin cuotas ni consejeros profesionales. Abierto a cualquier persona que desee dejar de beber.
284.notes: Find local meetings at aa-ky.org or call your area's AA hotline. Open meetings welcome anyone; closed meetings for those with a drinking problem. Literature available at no cost.
284.notes_es: Encuentre reuniones locales en aa-ky.org. Reuniones abiertas dan la bienvenida a todos; cerradas para quienes tienen un problema de alcohol.
284.hours: Meeting schedules vary; many groups meet daily—check aa-ky.org
284.services: In-person AA meetings|Online meeting options|Area meeting directories|Peer-led sobriety support|Sponsorship connections

300.description: Kentucky Community and Technical College System (KCTCS) administers free adult education and GED preparation statewide through 13 college-based Kentucky Adult Education (KYAE) providers in all 120 counties. Classes offered in communities, jails, and prisons. Kentucky pays for first GED test in each subject (plus limited retakes) for eligible test-takers who pass the free GED Ready practice test—use promo code KYFREEGED1. Over 4,460 GEDs awarded to incarcerated Kentuckians 2020–2024.
300.description_es: KCTCS administra educación para adultos y preparación GED gratuita en 120 condados a través de 13 proveedores KYAE. Clases en comunidades, cárceles y prisiones. Kentucky paga la primera prueba GED en cada materia para elegibles que pasen GED Ready—código KYFREEGED1. Más de 4,460 GEDs otorgados a personas encarceladas 2020–2024.
300.notes: Find your local center at kyae.ky.gov or adulted.ky.gov. Minimum age 19 without waiver; 17–18 with school withdrawal documentation. Also offers ESL, workforce certifications, and family literacy.
300.notes_es: Encuentre su centro en kyae.ky.gov. Edad mínima 19 sin exención. También ofrece ESL, certificaciones laborales y alfabetización familiar.
300.hours: Local center hours vary by KCTCS college—contact nearest provider
300.services: Free GED preparation classes|Corrections education in jails and prisons|GED Ready practice testing|Free first-time GED testing|ESL and workforce certifications

301.description: Bluegrass Community & Technical College (BCTC) Adult Education provides free GED preparation for adults in Central Kentucky—Fayette, Bourbon, Clark, Harrison, Jessamine, Mercer, Scott, and Woodford counties. In-person and online class options. Part of the statewide KYAE/KCTCS network with free GED Ready testing and state-funded first-time GED exam fees for eligible students.
301.description_es: Educación para Adultos de BCTC ofrece preparación GED gratuita en el centro de Kentucky—8 condados incluido Fayette. Opciones en persona y en línea. Parte de la red KYAE/KCTCS con GED Ready gratuito y exámenes GED financiados por el estado para elegibles.
301.notes: Enrollment requires intake and skills assessment. Contact BCTCAdultEd@kctcs.edu. Minimum age 19 or age waiver through local school board for 18-year-olds.
301.notes_es: Inscripción requiere evaluación de habilidades. Contacte BCTCAdultEd@kctcs.edu. Edad mínima 19 o exención para 18 años.
301.hours: Monday–Friday during business hours; class schedules vary by location
301.services: Free GED classes|Online and in-person instruction|GED Ready testing|College transition support|Workforce certification referrals

302.description: Gateway Community & Technical College Adult Education offers free GED preparation in Northern Kentucky for Boone, Kenton, Campbell, Grant, Owen, and surrounding counties. Kentucky waives GED testing fees for first-time test takers working through a KYAE center. Classes at Florence campus and community sites. Gateway also recognizes GED College Ready scores for college enrollment.
302.description_es: Educación para Adultos de Gateway ofrece preparación GED gratuita en el norte de Kentucky para Boone, Kenton, Campbell, Grant, Owen y condados circundantes. Kentucky exonera tarifas GED para primeros solicitantes a través de un centro KYAE. Clases en Florence y sitios comunitarios.
302.notes: Contact (859) 442-1695 or Gina DeWard for enrollment. GED fee waiver available when working with local Gateway/KYAE office.
302.notes_es: Contacte al (859) 442-1695 para inscripción. Exención de tarifa GED disponible trabajando con la oficina Gateway/KYAE.
302.services: Free GED preparation|Testing fee waiver assistance|GED Ready practice tests|College enrollment pathway|Workforce skills training

303.description: Southcentral Kentucky Community & Technical College (SKYCTC) Adult Education provides free GED classes for Warren, Barren, Simpson, and Metcalfe counties. Part of the KCTCS/KYAE statewide network with corrections education offerings. Kentucky covers first GED test fees for eligible students completing GED Ready through a local center.
303.description_es: Educación para Adultos de SKYCTC ofrece clases GED gratuitas para los condados Warren, Barren, Simpson y Metcalfe. Parte de la red KCTCS/KYAE con educación correccional. Kentucky cubre las primeras tarifas GED para elegibles.
303.notes: Call (270) 901-1017 for enrollment and class schedules. Age waiver available for 18-year-olds through local school district.
303.notes_es: Llame al (270) 901-1017 para inscripción y horarios. Exención de edad disponible para 18 años a través del distrito escolar.
303.services: Free GED preparation|Skills assessment and intake|GED testing coordination|Workforce certification pathways|Corrections education

304.description: Kentucky Adult Education (KYAE) is the state office connecting residents to free adult education in all 120 counties—GED preparation, literacy, ESL, workforce certifications, and family literacy. Use the online locator to find your county's KCTCS-based adult education center. All GED seekers must pass the GED Ready practice test (free at KYAE centers) before qualifying for state-funded GED testing.
304.description_es: Kentucky Adult Education (KYAE) conecta a residentes con educación para adultos gratuita en 120 condados—GED, alfabetización, ESL, certificaciones laborales y alfabetización familiar. Use el localizador en línea para encontrar su centro. Todos deben pasar GED Ready (gratis en centros KYAE) antes de calificar para pruebas financiadas.
304.notes: Promo codes: KYFREEGED1 (test center) or OPKYFREEGED (online proctored). Enrollment not required to test but strongly recommended for academic support.
304.notes_es: Códigos promocionales: KYFREEGED1 (centro) u OPKYFREEGED (en línea). Inscripción no requerida pero recomendada para apoyo académico.
304.hours: Varies by county center—use locator for local contact
304.services: County program locator|GED pathway information|ESL and literacy referrals|Workforce certification programs|Free GED Ready testing info

400.description: Robley Rex VA Medical Center is a full-service VA hospital serving Louisville-area veterans 24/7. Offers primary care, mental health, substance use treatment, specialty care, and homeless veteran services. Justice-involved veterans can access Veterans Justice Outreach (VJO) coordinators embedded in mental health who work with courts, jails, and probation. Toll-free: 800-376-8387.
400.description_es: Robley Rex VA Medical Center es un hospital del VA de servicio completo para veteranos del área de Louisville las 24 horas. Ofrece atención primaria, salud mental, tratamiento de sustancias y servicios para veteranos sin hogar. Veteranos en el sistema de justicia acceden a coordinadores VJO en salud mental. Toll-free: 800-376-8387.
400.notes: Enroll in VA health care at va.gov/health-care/apply. VJO: ask for Mental Health/VJO when calling main line. Emergency: 911 or visit ER 24/7.
400.notes_es: Inscríbase en atención VA en va.gov/health-care/apply. VJO: pida Salud Mental/VJO al llamar. Emergencia: 911 o ER 24/7.
400.services: Primary and specialty medical care|Mental health and SUD treatment|Veterans Justice Outreach|Homeless veteran care coordination|Emergency services

401.description: Louisville VA Veterans Justice Outreach (VJO) places four coordinators at Robley Rex VA who work directly with courts, jails, and probation/parole to identify and engage justice-involved veterans. VJO helps veterans access VA mental health, substance use treatment, housing, and benefits as an alternative to incarceration when appropriate. Ask for Mental Health/VJO when calling the medical center.
401.description_es: VJO del VA de Louisville coloca cuatro coordinadores en Robley Rex que trabajan con tribunales, cárceles y libertad condicional para identificar veteranos en el sistema de justicia. VJO ayuda a acceder a salud mental, tratamiento de sustancias, vivienda y beneficios del VA. Pida Salud Mental/VJO al llamar.
401.notes: VJO specialists: Sonny Hatfield, Scott Huisman, Dawne James, Keather Likins. Works with Jefferson County VTC and specialty courts. Veterans Crisis Line: 988 press 1.
401.notes_es: Especialistas VJO: Sonny Hatfield, Scott Huisman, Dawne James, Keather Likins. Línea de crisis: 988 presione 1.
401.hours: Coordinators available during business hours; crisis line 24/7
401.services: Court and jail outreach to veterans|VA benefits and treatment linkage|Alternative-to-incarceration coordination|Substance use and mental health referrals|Housing and reentry navigation

402.description: Lexington VA Health Care System serves Central and Eastern Kentucky veterans across Leestown and Sousley campuses. Full-service medical center with mental health, substance use treatment, primary care, and specialty services. Justice-involved veterans can connect with VJO coordinators and homeless veteran care teams for reentry support from jails and courts in the region.
402.description_es: Lexington VA Health Care System sirve a veteranos del centro y este de Kentucky en los campus Leestown y Sousley. Centro médico completo con salud mental, tratamiento de sustancias y atención primaria. Veteranos en el sistema de justicia pueden conectarse con coordinadores VJO y equipos de veteranos sin hogar.
402.notes: Main campus: 1101 Veterans Drive (Leestown). Enroll at va.gov/health-care/apply. Sousley campus offers additional outpatient services.
402.notes_es: Campus principal: 1101 Veterans Drive (Leestown). Inscríbase en va.gov/health-care/apply.
402.hours: Varies by clinic; emergency services available—call for hours
402.services: Primary and specialty care|Mental health and SUD treatment|VJO coordination|Homeless veteran services|Telehealth options

403.description: Lexington VA Veterans Justice Outreach connects justice-involved veterans in Central and Eastern Kentucky to VA mental health, substance use, housing, and benefits through court and jail partnerships. VJO coordinators Kathy Vasquez and Janis Skilling serve Fayette County and surrounding regions including satellite Vet Center locations in Corbin, Lawrenceburg, London, Mt. Sterling, and Richmond.
403.description_es: VJO del VA de Lexington conecta a veteranos en el sistema de justicia en el centro y este de Kentucky con salud mental, sustancias, vivienda y beneficios del VA. Coordinadoras Kathy Vasquez y Janis Skilling sirven Fayette y regiones circundantes incluyendo Centros Vet satélite.
403.notes: VJO emails: kathy.vasquez2@va.gov, janis.skilling@va.gov. Call main Lexington VA line and request VJO. National homeless veteran line: 877-424-3838.
403.notes_es: Correos VJO: kathy.vasquez2@va.gov, janis.skilling@va.gov. Línea nacional veteranos sin hogar: 877-424-3838.
403.hours: Business hours; after-hours crisis via Veterans Crisis Line 988 press 1
403.services: Court and jail veteran identification|VA treatment enrollment assistance|Housing and benefits navigation|Specialty court coordination|Regional satellite outreach

404.description: National Call Center for Homeless Veterans (877-4AID-VET) is a free, confidential 24/7 hotline connecting veterans— including those leaving incarceration without housing—to the nearest VA homeless program, emergency shelter, and case management. Critical first contact for veterans with no place to stay after release. Trained counselors assess needs and link to HUD-VASH, SSVF, and other VA housing resources.
404.description_es: Línea nacional para veteranos sin hogar (877-4AID-VET) es una línea gratuita y confidencial 24/7 que conecta a veteranos—incluidos los que salen del encarcelamiento sin vivienda—con el programa de vivienda del VA más cercano, refugio de emergencia y gestión de casos.
404.notes: Also chat at va.gov/homeless/nationalcallcenter.asp. Have DD-214 and SSN ready if available. Works with local VA Medical Center homeless teams.
404.notes_es: También chat en va.gov/homeless. Tenga DD-214 y SSN listos si están disponibles.
404.hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
404.services: 24/7 homeless veteran triage|VA housing program referrals|Emergency shelter connections|Case management linkage|HUD-VASH and SSVF intake routing

405.description: Veterans Crisis Line provides free, confidential crisis support for veterans and their families 24/7. Call or text 988 then press 1, or chat at veteranscrisisline.net. Trained responders—many veterans themselves—provide immediate support for suicidal crisis, PTSD episodes, and reentry stress. Also supports active duty, Guard, Reserve, and family members.
405.description_es: Línea de Crisis para Veteranos ofrece apoyo gratuito y confidencial 24/7. Llame o envíe mensaje al 988 y presione 1, o chat en veteranscrisisline.net. Respondedores capacitados brindan apoyo inmediato en crisis suicida, TEPT y estrés de reinserción.
405.notes: Text 838255 to connect. Does not require VA enrollment. If immediate danger, call 911. Spanish-language support available.
405.notes_es: Envíe mensaje al 838255. No requiere inscripción en VA. Si hay peligro inmediato, llame al 911. Soporte en español disponible.
405.hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
405.services: Immediate crisis counseling|988 press 1 veteran line|Text and chat support|Connection to local VA resources|Family member support

406.description: Louisville Vet Center provides free, confidential counseling in a non-VA community setting for combat veterans and their families—often easier to access than a medical center. Services include PTSD treatment, military sexual trauma (MST) support, readjustment counseling, bereavement, and reentry navigation. No cost regardless of discharge status for combat veterans. Same 877 number provides 24/7 crisis support.
406.description_es: Louisville Vet Center ofrece consejería gratuita y confidencial en un entorno comunitario no-VA para veteranos de combate y familias. Servicios incluyen tratamiento de TEPT, apoyo MST, consejería de reajuste y navegación de reinserción. Sin costo para veteranos de combate. Mismo número 877 brinda apoyo de crisis 24/7.
406.notes: Combat veterans and family members eligible. Call 877-927-8387 for intake. Also serves National Guard/Reserve with combat experience. No insurance or VA enrollment required for Vet Center services.
406.notes_es: Veteranos de combate y familiares elegibles. Llame al 877-927-8387 para admisión. No requiere seguro ni inscripción VA.
406.services: PTSD and readjustment counseling|MST support|Bereavement counseling|Reentry and family support|24/7 crisis line access

407.description: Lexington Vet Center offers free counseling and reentry support for combat veterans in a welcoming, non-clinical community setting. Satellite outreach locations in Corbin, Lawrenceburg, London, Mt. Sterling, and Richmond extend access across Central and Eastern Kentucky. Services include PTSD treatment, MST support, marriage and family counseling, and employment transition help.
407.description_es: Lexington Vet Center ofrece consejería gratuita y apoyo de reinserción para veteranos de combate en un entorno comunitario acogedor. Ubicaciones satélite en Corbin, Lawrenceburg, London, Mt. Sterling y Richmond. Servicios incluyen TEPT, MST, consejería familiar y transición laboral.
407.notes: Call 877-927-8387 for appointments at any location. Combat service required for most services. 24/7 crisis support on same number.
407.notes_es: Llame al 877-927-8387 para citas en cualquier ubicación. Servicio de combate requerido para la mayoría de servicios.
407.hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m.; satellite hours vary—call to confirm
407.services: Individual and group counseling|PTSD and MST treatment|Satellite outreach in 5 cities|Employment transition support|24/7 crisis line

408.description: Louisville VA Regional Benefit Office processes disability compensation claims, pension, education benefits (GI Bill), vocational rehabilitation (VR&E Chapter 31), and life insurance for Kentucky veterans. Chapter 31 VR&E helps veterans with service-connected disabilities prepare for, find, and keep employment—including justice-involved veterans rebuilding careers after incarceration.
408.description_es: Oficina Regional de Beneficios del VA de Louisville procesa reclamaciones de compensación por discapacidad, pensión, beneficios educativos (GI Bill), rehabilitación vocacional (VR&E Capítulo 31) y seguro de vida. Capítulo 31 VR&E ayuda a veteranos con discapacidades relacionadas con el servicio a prepararse y mantener empleo.
408.notes: Chapter 31 Voc Rehab direct line: (502) 566-4453. Appointments recommended. File claims online at va.gov. Main toll-free: (800) 827-1000.
408.notes_es: Capítulo 31 VR&E: (502) 566-4453. Presente reclamaciones en línea en va.gov.
408.services: Disability compensation claims|Pension and education benefits|VR&E Chapter 31 employment services|Life insurance|Benefits counseling and appeals

409.description: HUD-VASH pairs HUD Section 8 rental vouchers with VA case management for homeless veterans, including those transitioning from incarceration. Entry point is through the VA Medical Center homeless team—call Robley Rex at (502) 287-4000 or the National Call Center at 877-424-3838. Louisville Metro Housing Authority administers local vouchers. VOA Mid-States provides SSVF (Supportive Services for Veteran Families) across Kentucky.
409.description_es: HUD-VASH combina vales de alquiler HUD Sección 8 con gestión de casos del VA para veteranos sin hogar, incluidos los que salen del encarcelamiento. Punto de entrada: equipo de veteranos sin hogar del VA—Robley Rex (502) 287-4000 o 877-424-3838. Louisville Metro Housing Authority administra vales locales. VOA Mid-States ofrece SSVF.
409.notes: LMHA: (502) 569-6060. VOA Mid-States SSVF: (502) 384-0868. Must be enrolled in VA health care. Vouchers limited—waitlists apply.
409.notes_es: LMHA: (502) 569-6060. VOA SSVF: (502) 384-0868. Debe estar inscrito en atención VA. Listas de espera aplican.
409.hours: VA intake during business hours; homeless hotline 24/7
409.services: HUD rental voucher referral|VA case management|SSVF rapid rehousing|Homeless veteran intake|Housing search assistance

410.description: Kentucky Department of Veterans Affairs (KDVA) is the state agency supporting Kentucky's 290,000+ veterans with 20 federally accredited Veteran Service Officers (VSOs) in regional offices. Programs include Veterans High School Diploma, Homeless Veterans Program, Women Veterans Program, and free benefits claims assistance. VSOs help file VA disability, pension, and education claims at no charge.
410.description_es: KDVA es la agencia estatal que apoya a más de 290,000 veteranos de Kentucky con 20 Oficiales de Servicios para Veteranos (VSO) acreditados federalmente. Programas incluyen Diploma de Escuela Secundaria para Veteranos, Programa para Veteranos sin Hogar, Mujeres Veteranas y asistencia gratuita con reclamaciones de beneficios.
410.notes: Find your regional VSO at veterans.ky.gov. State benefits info and military records assistance. Does not replace VA medical care enrollment.
410.notes_es: Encuentre su VSO regional en veterans.ky.gov. Información de beneficios estatales. No reemplaza inscripción en atención médica VA.
410.hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m. (regional offices; hours may vary)
410.services: Free VA benefits claims assistance|Veterans High School Diploma Program|Homeless veterans state support|Women veterans resources|Regional VSO network

411.description: VFW Department of Kentucky provides free VA-accredited service officers who help veterans file disability compensation, pension, vocational rehabilitation, and employment benefit claims. Post-level VSOs located throughout the state—no membership required for claims assistance. Department headquarters in Louisville coordinates training and advocacy for Kentucky veterans.
411.description_es: VFW de Kentucky proporciona oficiales de servicio acreditados por el VA gratuitos que ayudan a presentar reclamaciones de compensación por discapacidad, pensión, rehabilitación vocacional y beneficios de empleo. VSO a nivel de post en todo el estado—no se requiere membresía para asistencia.
411.notes: Contact vfwdeptky@gmail.com or call department HQ. Find nearest post VSO at vfwky.org. Bring DD-214, medical records, and claim-related documents to appointments.
411.notes_es: Contacte vfwdeptky@gmail.com. Encuentre el VSO más cercano en vfwky.org. Traiga DD-214 y registros médicos.
411.hours: Department office Mon–Fri business hours; post hours vary
411.services: VA disability claims assistance|Pension and benefits filing|Vocational rehabilitation claims|Post-level VSO network|Veterans advocacy

412.description: Kentucky American Legion operates a statewide network of free Veteran Service Officers helping veterans navigate VA disability claims, pension applications, and benefits appeals. Local posts in communities across all 120 counties provide claims assistance without requiring Legion membership. Department headquarters in Louisville.
412.description_es: Legión Americana de Kentucky opera una red estatal de Oficiales de Servicios para Veteranos gratuitos que ayudan con reclamaciones de discapacidad del VA, solicitudes de pensión y apelaciones. Posts locales en 120 condados—no se requiere membresía para asistencia.
412.notes: Department HQ: (502) 587-1414. Find local post VSO at kylegion.org. American Legion also offers Temporary Financial Assistance and youth programs.
412.notes_es: HQ departamental: (502) 587-1414. Encuentre VSO local en kylegion.org.
412.hours: Department office Mon–Fri business hours; post schedules vary
412.services: VA claims and appeals assistance|Benefits navigation|Pension and disability filing|Local post VSO network|Veterans advocacy

430.description: Wayside Christian Mission provides emergency shelter, meals, clothing, and hygiene supplies for men and women in downtown Louisville. Operates the Sober Living Recovery Program and Work Therapy Program for residents building stability after homelessness or incarceration. Accepts donated clothing and distributes to clients. 24/7 shelter access for those in crisis.
430.description_es: Wayside Christian Mission proporciona refugio de emergencia, comidas, ropa y artículos de higiene en el centro de Louisville. Opera el Programa de Vida Sobria y Terapia Laboral para residentes que construyen estabilidad después de la falta de vivienda o encarcelamiento. Acepta donaciones de ropa.
430.notes: Hotel Louisville property also operated by Wayside. Call ahead for program-specific intake (recovery vs. emergency shelter). Donations accepted during business hours.
430.notes_es: Propiedad Hotel Louisville también operada por Wayside. Llame para admisión específica del programa. Donaciones aceptadas en horario laboral.
430.hours: Emergency shelter 24/7; administrative offices Mon–Fri business hours
430.services: Emergency shelter and meals|Clothing and hygiene distribution|Sober Living Recovery Program|Work Therapy Program|Donation intake

431.description: St. Vincent de Paul Louisville operates a client-choice food pantry, Open Hand Kitchen daily meals, Ozanam Inn men's emergency shelter (58 beds with 24/7 case management), emergency financial assistance, and thrift stores with affordable clothing and household goods. Serves low-income Louisvillians including people reentering from incarceration who need food, clothing, and short-term shelter.
431.description_es: St. Vincent de Paul Louisville opera despensa de alimentos, Open Hand Kitchen, refugio Ozanam Inn para hombres (58 camas con gestión de casos 24/7), asistencia financiera de emergencia y tiendas de segunda mano. Sirve a personas de bajos ingresos incluidas las que regresan del encarcelamiento.
431.notes: Ozanam Inn: men's shelter with case management. Thrift stores at multiple locations—affordable clothing. Financial assistance by appointment—call for eligibility.
431.notes_es: Ozanam Inn: refugio para hombres con gestión de casos. Tiendas de segunda mano en varias ubicaciones. Asistencia financiera con cita.
431.hours: Pantry and kitchen hours vary; call (502) 584-2480 for schedules
431.services: Client-choice food pantry|Daily community meals|Men's emergency shelter (Ozanam Inn)|Emergency financial aid|Affordable thrift store clothing

432.description: Dress for Success Louisville provides professional attire, career coaching, and support services for women entering or re-entering the workforce—including after incarceration. Referral required from a partner agency such as Goodwill KY, Louisville Urban League, Kentucky Career Centers, or Seven Counties. Has served 16,500+ women with suiting, interview preparation, and ongoing career support.
432.description_es: Dress for Success Louisville proporciona ropa profesional, orientación profesional y apoyo para mujeres que ingresan o regresan al mercado laboral—incluidas después del encarcelamiento. Se requiere referido de agencia asociada como Goodwill KY, Louisville Urban League o Kentucky Career Centers.
432.notes: Referral required—contact a partner agency first. Boutique appointments after referral. Also offers Professional Women's Group for ongoing support after employment.
432.notes_es: Se requiere referido—contacte primero una agencia asociada. Citas en boutique después del referido.
432.hours: By appointment after referral; Mon–Fri typical scheduling
432.services: Professional interview attire|Career coaching and interview prep|Referral-based suiting appointments|Professional Women's Group|Workforce reentry support for women

450.description: Kentucky Department of Corrections Division of Probation and Parole Central Office oversees community supervision statewide for approximately 55,000 probationers and parolees. Contact for general policy questions, interstate compact matters, or referral to your local district office. Does not replace reporting to your assigned district—always contact your supervising officer for case-specific needs.
450.description_es: Oficina Central de Libertad Condicional y Vigilada del DOC de Kentucky supervisa la supervisión comunitaria estatal para aproximadamente 55,000 personas. Contacte para preguntas generales, asuntos interestatales o referido a su oficina de distrito. No reemplaza reportarse a su distrito asignado.
450.notes: Interstate Compact Parole: (502) 782-2317. Interstate Compact Probation: (502) 782-2262. Home Incarceration: (859) 753-6834. Find district contacts at corrections.ky.gov/Contact.
450.notes_es: Compacto Interestatal Parole: (502) 782-2317. Compacto Probation: (502) 782-2262. Encuentre contactos de distrito en corrections.ky.gov.
450.services: Central office information|District office referral|Interstate compact coordination|Home incarceration program info|Supervision policy guidance

451.description: Jefferson County Probation & Parole offices at Chestnut Centre (410 W. Chestnut St.) house multiple DOC districts serving Louisville-area probationers and parolees. District 16 (7th floor, 502-896-1775) and District 4 (4th floor, 502-595-4035) among others share the building. Report to the district assigned on your release paperwork—call your officer if unsure.
451.description_es: Oficinas de Libertad Condicional y Vigilada del Condado de Jefferson en Chestnut Centre (410 W. Chestnut St.) albergan múltiples distritos del DOC. Distrito 16 (piso 7, 502-896-1775) y Distrito 4 (piso 4, 502-595-4035) comparten el edificio. Reporte al distrito asignado en su documentación de liberación.
451.notes: District 16: 7th floor, (502) 896-1775. District 4: 4th floor, (502) 595-4035. District 17: (502) 595-3405. Always report to assigned district per release documents.
451.notes_es: Distrito 16: piso 7, (502) 896-1775. Distrito 4: piso 4, (502) 595-4035. Reporte siempre al distrito asignado.
451.services: Probation supervision|Parole supervision|Reporting and check-ins|Case officer contact|Referrals to reentry services

452.description: Kentucky DOC Probation & Parole District 9 serves Fayette County and surrounding Central Kentucky from the Mercer Road office. Supervises felony and misdemeanor probation, parole, and conditional discharge cases. Report on schedule assigned by your officer; call office for address verification or schedule changes.
452.description_es: Distrito 9 de Libertad Condicional y Vigilada del DOC sirve al Condado de Fayette y el centro de Kentucky desde la oficina de Mercer Road. Supervisa casos de libertad condicional, vigilada y descarga condicional. Reporte según el horario asignado por su oficial.
452.notes: District 9 supervisor contact via central office (502) 782-2277 if main line unavailable. Bring photo ID to all reporting appointments.
452.notes_es: Contacto del supervisor vía oficina central (502) 782-2277 si la línea principal no está disponible. Traiga identificación con foto.
452.services: Probation and parole supervision|Scheduled reporting|Officer case management|Community supervision compliance|Reentry resource referrals

453.description: Kentucky DOC Probation & Parole District 7 serves Kenton County and Northern Kentucky from the Covington courthouse area. Supervises probationers and parolees in Boone, Campbell, Kenton, and surrounding NKY counties. Contact office for reporting schedule, officer assignment, and verification of compliance requirements.
453.description_es: Distrito 7 de Libertad Condicional y Vigilada sirve al Condado de Kenton y el norte de Kentucky desde Covington. Supervisa personas en libertad condicional y vigilada en Boone, Campbell, Kenton y condados circundantes de NKY.
453.notes: Located in Covington courthouse complex. Call before first visit to confirm floor and check-in procedure. Central DOC line: (502) 782-2277.
453.notes_es: Ubicado en el complejo del tribunal de Covington. Llame antes de la primera visita para confirmar piso y procedimiento.
453.services: Probation and parole supervision|Reporting appointments|Case officer management|Compliance monitoring|Northern KY supervision

454.description: Kentucky DOC Probation & Parole District 3 serves Warren, Adair, Barren, Casey, Cumberland, and Metcalfe counties from Bowling Green. Regional supervision hub for south-central Kentucky parolees and probationers. Contact for reporting schedules, officer changes, and travel permission requests.
454.description_es: Distrito 3 sirve a los condados Warren, Adair, Barren, Casey, Cumberland y Metcalfe desde Bowling Green. Centro regional de supervisión para libertad condicional y vigilada en el centro-sur de Kentucky.
454.notes: Old Porter Pike location. Interstate compact and transfer questions: central office (502) 782-2277.
454.notes_es: Ubicación Old Porter Pike. Preguntas de compacto interestatal: oficina central (502) 782-2277.
454.services: Multi-county probation supervision|Parole reporting|Officer assignment|Travel and transfer requests|Compliance support

455.description: Kentucky DOC Probation & Parole District 1 serves McCracken County and Western Kentucky's Purchase region from Paducah. Entry point for probation and parole supervision in the far west of the state. Contact for reporting requirements and officer information after release to Paducah area.
455.description_es: Distrito 1 sirve al Condado de McCracken y la región Purchase del oeste de Kentucky desde Paducah. Punto de entrada para supervisión de libertad condicional y vigilada en el extremo oeste del estado.
455.notes: District 1 phone confirmed on DOC contact page: (270) 575-7235. Central office for district questions: (502) 782-2277.
455.services: Western KY probation supervision|Parole reporting|Purchase region case management|Officer contact|Compliance monitoring

456.description: Kentucky DOC Probation & Parole District 11 serves Pike County and surrounding Eastern Kentucky coalfield counties from Pikeville. Supervises probation and parole cases in one of Kentucky's most rural reentry regions. Contact office for reporting location and schedule after release to Eastern KY.
456.description_es: Distrito 11 sirve al Condado de Pike y condados circundantes del este de Kentucky desde Pikeville. Supervisa casos de libertad condicional y vigilada en una de las regiones de reinserción más rurales de Kentucky.
456.notes: Eastern KY district—transportation to reporting can be a barrier; discuss with officer. EKCEP (id 281) offers barrier relief in overlapping counties.
456.notes_es: Distrito del este de KY—transporte puede ser barrera; discuta con su oficial. EKCEP ofrece alivio de barreras en condados superpuestos.
456.services: Eastern KY probation supervision|Parole reporting|Rural reentry supervision|Officer case management|Compliance monitoring

470.description: Center for Employment Opportunities (CEO) Louisville exclusively serves people recently released from incarceration who are on probation or parole. One-week job-readiness orientation leads to paid transitional work crews (daily pay), then job coaching, employer outreach, and up to one year of retention support after full-time placement. Referral through parole/probation officer required. Opened August 2019 in partnership with KY DOC and KYTC.
470.description_es: CEO Louisville sirve exclusivamente a personas recién liberadas en libertad condicional o vigilada. Orientación de una semana conduce a trabajos de transición pagados (pago diario), luego coaching laboral y hasta un año de apoyo después de la colocación. Se requiere referido del oficial de libertad condicional/vigilada.
470.notes: Bring government photo ID and Social Security card to orientation. Site Director: Ray Mansfield (rmansfield@ceoworks.org). KYTC partners for landscaping and litter crew experience.
470.notes_es: Traiga identificación con foto y tarjeta del Seguro Social a la orientación. Director: Ray Mansfield (rmansfield@ceoworks.org).
470.services: Paid transitional work crews|Job-readiness orientation|Job coaching and placement|Employer outreach|One-year retention support

471.description: Louisville Metro Reentry Task Force is a coalition coordinating reentry services across Louisville Metro agencies, nonprofits, and faith communities. Connects returning citizens with local resources and maintains communication channels for service providers. Contact for community-level reentry navigation—not a direct service provider but a coordination hub.
471.description_es: Louisville Metro Reentry Task Force es una coalición que coordina servicios de reinserción entre agencias, organizaciones sin fines de lucro y comunidades de fe de Louisville Metro. Conecta a ciudadanos que regresan con recursos locales. Hub de coordinación, no proveedor directo de servicios.
471.notes: Email glenn@louisvillereentry.org for coalition information. Works alongside Louisville Metro Criminal Justice Commission and Kentucky Reentry Toolkit.
471.notes_es: Correo glenn@louisvillereentry.org para información de la coalición. Trabaja con la Comisión de Justicia Criminal de Louisville Metro.
471.hours: Contact by email or phone during business hours
471.services: Reentry resource coordination|Service provider network|Community reentry advocacy|Agency collaboration|Resource platform support

472.description: Louisville Metro Criminal Justice Commission operates the Kentucky Reentry Toolkit (reentrytool.ky.gov)—a free online platform with life skills resources, case coordination tools, and connections to Louisville Metro reentry services. Dedicated reentry coordinator available through the Commission for individuals and service providers navigating the reentry landscape.
472.description_es: La Comisión de Justicia Criminal de Louisville Metro opera la Herramienta de Reinserción de Kentucky (reentrytool.ky.gov)—plataforma en línea gratuita con recursos de habilidades para la vida, herramientas de coordinación de casos y conexiones a servicios de reinserción de Louisville Metro.
472.notes: Online toolkit accessible statewide but focused on Louisville Metro resources. Commission office at 514 W. Liberty St., Suite 106.
472.notes_es: Herramienta en línea accesible en todo el estado pero enfocada en recursos de Louisville Metro. Oficina: 514 W. Liberty St.
472.services: Kentucky Reentry Toolkit online platform|Life skills resource library|Reentry coordinator access|Service provider connections|Case coordination tools

473.description: Louisville Urban League Workforce Development Center provides career counseling, case management, job readiness training, placement referrals, and post-placement support for individuals facing employment barriers—including criminal records. Partners with Dress for Success for women clients. Serves Louisville Metro with emphasis on equitable access to living-wage employment.
473.description_es: Centro de Desarrollo de la Fuerza Laboral de Louisville Urban League proporciona orientación profesional, gestión de casos, capacitación para preparación laboral, referencias de colocación y apoyo posterior para personas con barreras de empleo—incluidos antecedentes penales. Socio de Dress for Success.
473.notes: Can provide Dress for Success referral for women. Also offers youth programs and housing counseling. Walk-in and appointment options—call ahead.
473.notes_es: Puede proporcionar referido a Dress for Success para mujeres. También ofrece programas juveniles y consejería de vivienda.
473.services: Career counseling and case management|Job readiness training|Employer placement referrals|Post-placement retention support|Dress for Success partner referrals

474.description: AMPED Louisville is a nonprofit serving Black and Latinx communities through technology workforce training, small business incubation, and economic mobility programming. Programs welcome individuals with justice involvement seeking digital skills, entrepreneurship pathways, and career advancement in Louisville's tech and business sectors.
474.description_es: AMPED Louisville es una organización sin fines de lucro que sirve a comunidades negras y latinas con capacitación en tecnología, incubación de pequeñas empresas y programación de movilidad económica. Programas dan la bienvenida a personas con participación judicial que buscan habilidades digitales y emprendimiento.
474.notes: West Market Street location in Russell neighborhood. Email AMPEDLouisville@gmail.com for program enrollment. Technology training and business incubation tracks available.
474.notes_es: Ubicación en West Market Street en el barrio Russell. Correo AMPEDLouisville@gmail.com para inscripción.
474.hours: Program hours vary—contact for current cohort schedules
474.services: Technology workforce training|Small business incubation|Economic mobility programming|Digital literacy|Entrepreneurship support

475.description: Brighton Center is a comprehensive human services nonprofit in Newport serving Campbell and surrounding Northern Kentucky counties. Offers workforce development, financial coaching, housing navigation, family stability services, and emergency assistance for people facing barriers including justice involvement. One-stop resource for NKY reentry support beyond employment alone.
475.description_es: Brighton Center es una organización integral de servicios sociales en Newport que sirve al Condado de Campbell y el norte de Kentucky. Ofrece desarrollo laboral, coaching financiero, navegación de vivienda, estabilidad familiar y asistencia de emergencia para personas con barreras incluida participación judicial.
475.notes: Services include NKY Career Center co-location, housing programs, and youth services. Call for intake appointment. Serves Boone, Campbell, Kenton, and surrounding counties.
475.notes_es: Servicios incluyen NKY Career Center, programas de vivienda y servicios juveniles. Llame para cita de admisión.
475.services: Workforce development|Financial coaching and literacy|Housing navigation|Family stability programs|Emergency assistance

476.description: Life Learning Center in Covington provides workforce development for adults facing significant employment barriers including criminal records. Offers job-readiness training, digital literacy, placement assistance, and employer connections across Northern Kentucky. Holistic model addresses barriers beyond skills training to support sustainable employment.
476.description_es: Life Learning Center en Covington proporciona desarrollo laboral para adultos con barreras significativas de empleo incluidos antecedentes penales. Ofrece capacitación para preparación laboral, alfabetización digital, asistencia de colocación y conexiones con empleadores en el norte de Kentucky.
476.notes: Enrollment requires application and interview. Programs include financial literacy and personal development alongside job training. Call (859) 491-8300 for intake.
476.notes_es: Inscripción requiere solicitud y entrevista. Programas incluyen alfabetización financiera y desarrollo personal. Llame al (859) 491-8300.
476.hours: Monday–Friday during program hours—call for schedule
476.services: Job-readiness training|Digital literacy instruction|Employer placement connections|Personal development programming|Barrier-reduction support

477.description: Connect Ministries is a faith-based community outreach in Newport serving justice-involved individuals and people in recovery in Campbell County. Provides mentoring, peer support, basic needs assistance, and connections to housing and employment resources near the Campbell County Detention Center. Grassroots support for people reentering in Northern Kentucky.
477.description_es: Connect Ministries es un alcance comunitario de base religiosa en Newport que sirve a personas involucradas con la justicia y en recuperación en el Condado de Campbell. Proporciona mentoría, apoyo entre pares, necesidades básicas y conexiones a vivienda y empleo cerca del Centro de Detención del Condado de Campbell.
477.notes: Near Campbell County Detention Center. Faith-based but serves all. Contact for mentoring match and resource navigation.
477.notes_es: Cerca del Centro de Detención del Condado de Campbell. De base religiosa pero sirve a todos. Contacte para mentoría y navegación de recursos.
477.hours: Contact for appointment; community outreach hours vary
477.services: Faith-based mentoring|Peer support groups|Basic needs assistance|Housing resource connections|Employment resource navigation
